title: Tofu Stir Fry with Smoky Flavor
description: A delicious and quick stir fry recipe that combines the smoky flavor with the nutty taste of tofu. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the soy sauce, honey, and rice vinegar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the cooked tofu to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles and garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
